name: CSV metrics memo
purpose: Test exact data computation plus concise grounded reporting.
user_prompt: Calculate the metrics requested in spec.md and produce metrics.json and report.md.
environment_setup: Local public sample fixture. Real runs should use private hidden variants.
partial_credit_rules: Public scorer gives partial credit by check count. Private holdout should add hard gates for critical failures.
anti_overfitting_strategy: Use public cases for development, private holdout cases for final comparison, and mutation cases for brittleness checks.
implementation_notes: Public scorer computes expected values from CSV fixtures. Private variants should mutate data distribution.
public_notes: Synthetic public starter task. Do not treat public case_001 as a decision-grade benchmark.
